Double Major and Minor Program

MENU

Double Major Program

While continuing their education in the Department of Nutrition and Dietetics, our students can pursue a Double Major with one of the following departments and obtain a second diploma:

Department of Child Development

Department of Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation

Department of Gastronomy and Culinary Arts

Department of Nursing

Department of Psychology

Minor Program

Our students can pursue a Minor Program in the following departments of interest and receive a “Minor Certificate” upon completion:

Department of Child Development

Department of Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation

Department of Gastronomy and Culinary Arts

Department of Nursing

Department of Psychology

How to Apply?

Students enrolled in the Department of Nutrition and Dietetics may apply to Double Major or Minor Programs in affiliated departments after completing their first year, based on their academic performance.

The principles regarding Double Major and Minor Programs are outlined in the “Istanbul Okan University Directive for Double Major and Minor Programs.”

Click to view the Istanbul Okan University Directive.
